use_codes.desc: INDICATED TO RAISE BLOOD PRESSURE IN ADULT PATIENTS WITH SEVERE, ACUTE HYPOTENSION

indications.text:
Injection may cause arrhythmias. Monitor cardiac function in
Norepinephrine in Sodium Chloride Injection is a catecholamine indicated for patients with underlying heart disease. (5.3)
restoration of blood pressure in adult patients with acute hypotensive states.
